CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 2.0, 3.0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (2, 4.0, 5.0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (3, NULL, 6.0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (4, 8.0, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (5, 10.0, 12.0);
SELECT COVAR_POP(value1, value2) FROM (SELECT value1, value2 FROM test_data WHERE id > 1) AS subquery;
SELECT COVAR_POP(td1.value1, td2.value2) FROM test_data AS td1 JOIN test_data AS td2 ON td1.id <> td2.id;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (6, NULL, NULL);
SELECT COVAR_POP(value1, value2) FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL AND value2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COVAR_POP(value1, value2) FROM (SELECT value1, value2 FROM test_data) AS derived WHERE derived.value1 < 10;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_data AS SELECT value1, value2 FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COVAR_POP(value1, value2) FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value1 > 5);
